name: forge
description: Time Tracker with Google Spreadsheet integration

scripts.lint: pnpm --filter forge-app lint && pnpm --filter api lint
scripts.lint:fix: pnpm --filter forge-app lint:fix && pnpm --filter api lint:fix
scripts.type-check: pnpm --filter forge-app type-check && pnpm --filter api type-check
scripts.test: pnpm --filter forge-app test:run && pnpm --filter api test:run
scripts.verify: pnpm run lint && pnpm run format:check && pnpm run type-check && pnpm run test
